mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into `order` (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
